channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The messiah rises in Dune: Part Three’s new trailer
item.description: First comes love, then comes marriage, then comes a portentous set of twin babies in the new trailer for Dune: Part Three. Warner Bros. has debuted its first full trailer for Denis Villeneuve's third Dune film. Thankfully, it doesn't give everything about the film away, but it does put a spotlight on a few of […]

item.title: Samsung’s Smart Glasses Might Not Have to Do Much, Thanks to Meta
item.description: With Meta fumbling the bag on privacy, Samsung's "Galaxy Glasses" might be appealing by default.

item.title: Man City vs Real Madrid Free Streams: How to watch Champions League 2025/26 2nd leg, TV Channels, Preview
item.description: All the ways to watch Man City vs Real Madrid live streams online – including for FREE – in the decisive 2025/26 Champions League 2nd leg at the Etihad.

item.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day cast and character guide — Tom Holland, Zendaya, Sadie Sink, and every actor set to appear in the new Marvel movie
item.description: Spider-Man 4 marks Tom Holland's next outing as the titular superhero — and he'll be joined by a host of famous faces in the MCU movie.

item.title: I found the St Patrick's Day VPN deal that'll protect you for less than a pint of Guinness — here's how to claim
item.description: St Patrick's Day might be in full flow, but this record-low VPN deal is worth toast of its own

item.title: Après avoir lancé tout et n’importe quoi, OpenAI veut revenir à l’essentiel
item.description: À force de trop en faire, on finit par ne plus rien faire de bien. OpenAI, qui a considérablement diversifié ses services ces derniers mois, l'apprend dans la douleur et chercherait maintenant à resserrer ses activités vers ce qui compte vraiment : le développement logiciel et les usages professionnels.

item.title: VPN interest spikes in Brazil as mandatory age verification law takes effect
item.description: Brazil’s new Digital ECA law requires online providers to implement strict age verification. A massive surge in VPN usage suggests citizens are turning to encryption to protect their privacy.

item.title: Switch 2 software update adds 'Handheld Mode Boost' for your old games
item.description: We might not have had a proper Nintendo Direct in 2026 yet, but there have been plenty of Switch and Switch 2-related announcements in the last few weeks, including a release date for the Yoshi and the Mysterious Book, a surprise port of Kena: Bridge of Spirits and the final trailer for the imminent The Super Mario Galaxy Movie. But if you’re a Switch 2 owner who prefers to play your library of games in handheld mode, Nintendo’s latest announcement might be the one that interests you most. The company has released the 22.0.0 system update for its latest console, which brings with it a host of ...

item.title: It's no Nadal but this tennis-playing robot could change the future of the game
item.description: Galbot and researchers taught a robot how to play tennis without extensive training, and it could be a robots-in-sports game changer.

item.title: Lonely People Are Better Off Texting Strangers Than Messaging a Chatbot, Study Finds
item.description: There's a whole IRL world out there looking to make a friend.

item.title: Dyson's New PencilWash Is Here
item.description: The debut follows the release of Dyson's newest robot vacuum and larger wet cleaner last week.

item.title: Test du Acer Chromebook Plus Spin 514 (CP514-5HN) : clef-en-main, sans embûches ni abus
item.description: À l'heure où les prix ne cessent d'enfler, n'est-il pas temps de réfléchir à un Chromebook ? Le Spin 514 d'Acer continue de représenter une alternative sublime à Windows.

item.title: Google’s data center power playbook comes into focus
item.description: Google has long procured clean power for its operations and data centers, but recent deals show the company is changing tactics.

item.title: WhatsApp is now officially available on Garmin smartwatches
item.description: There's an official WhatsApp app for select Garmin smartwatches. It's available for free right now in the Garmin Connect IQ Store. WhatsApp is primarily a chat platform, so this new app allows users to read and reply to messages, send emojis and peruse the chat history. The app also lets users accept or decline incoming calls arriving from the platform, all without having to break out the smartphone. This is WhatsApp, so messages are end-to-end encrypted. As previously mentioned, it's not available for every Garmin watch. It's compatible with select Forerunner, Venu, Vivoactive and Fenix watch...

item.title: Le nouveau Xiaomi Poco X8 Pro Max avec son énorme batterie de 8 500 mAh est déjà en promo pour le lancement
item.description: C'est un modèle on ne peut plus récent et inédit : le Poco X8 Pro Max vient de sortir et séduit déjà avec son processeur puissant et sa batterie XL. Pour son lancement, il est à 429,90 euros pour la version 12+256 Go au lieu de 533 euros, et 469,90 euros au lieu de 583 euros pour le modèle 12+512 Go.

item.title: A Major Offshore Wind Farm Just Finished Construction. Trump Is Already Plotting a Counterattack
item.description: Vineyard Wind is the first offshore wind farm to finish construction under Trump. The administration is now weighing a billion-dollar deal to stop the next one.

item.title: Now everyone in the US is getting Google’s personalized Gemini AI
item.description: Google announced on Tuesday that all users in the US will now have access to its Personal Intelligence feature, which lets you connect various Google apps to provide context for Gemini's responses and suggestions. Access was previously limited to Google AI Pro and AI Ultra subscribers. Now, free-tier users in the US can also use […]

item.title: The ‘Dune: Part Three’ Trailer Makes It Look More Awesome Than the Last
item.description: Timothée Chalamet, Rebecca Ferguson, Zendaya, Javier Bardem, Florence Pugh, and more return for the sequel, out December 18.

item.title: Un an après Microsoft, Google bloque enfin cette extension Chrome malveillante
item.description: Une extension Chrome épinglée pour embarquer un malware vient tout juste d’être supprimée du Chrome Web Store. Google a visiblement mis un peu de temps pour réagir, l’extension ayant déjà été identifiée comme malveillante par Microsoft il y a plusieurs mois.

item.title: Nikon issues partial recall for three of its popular mirrorless cameras which could become 'inoperable' – here’s how to check and get a free repair
item.description: Certain units of the Nikon Z5 II, Z6 III and ZR have been built using faulty parts, and Nikon says continued use could lead to them becoming completely "inoperable".

item.title: Starfield is coming to PS5 on April 7
item.description: Starfield is officially coming to PS5, with a launch date set for April 7. Preorders are open right now for both the digital and physical versions. It's long been rumored that Bethesda's sci-fi RPG would be going multiplatform and, well, here we are. The PS5 version will tap into the DualSense controller's capabilities with adaptive triggers that work differently depending on the weapon you're using. The light bar will offer an indication of your character and ship health (if you ever look at it while you're playing, that is). You'll also be able to use the touchpad to switch between points o...

item.title: Bon plan VPN : CyberGhost affiche -82 % et 45 jours de garantie, son meilleur tarif du moment
item.description: CyberGhost propose en ce moment son abonnement deux ans à 2,19 € par mois, soit une réduction de 82 % sur le tarif mensuel standard. Avec deux mois offerts en prime, l'engagement total court sur 26 mois pour 56,94 € facturés en une fois. C'est l'une des offres les plus basses affichées par le service depuis plusieurs mois.

item.title: The PlayStation Portal is about to become even more of a PSP successor with its next major update
item.description: Sony has announced a new system software update for the PlayStation Portal that will add a new graphics mode and additional quality-of-life improvements.

item.title: 15 essential mini PC accessories: From cooling fans to eGPU docks, these peripherals power up your whole set-up
item.description: I found 15 extras for your mini PC set-up.

item.title: Nvidia’s DLSS 5 is going viral for all the wrong reasons — here are the 5 most controversial examples of the ‘AI-powered breakthrough’ in action
item.description: Nvidia has just released DLSS 5, but many gamers are unhappy with how it’s affecting their games.

item.title: Fortnite is back for everyone on Google Play — and I’m hoping it’ll be on the iPhone App Store soon too
item.description: Fortnite is finally back on the Play Store for all Android phone users — but if this was a V-Bucks price hike distraction fans aren’t falling for it.

item.title: This $650 Ryzen 7 Pro laptop deal is packed with 32GB DDR5 RAM in an early Amazon Spring Deal
item.description: Nimo’s 15.6-inch laptop pairs a Ryzen 7 PRO 6850U with 32GB of LPDDR5 RAM and a 1TB SSD for demanding creative work, and fast multitasking.

item.title: More Game Pass additions for March include Disco Elysium and Resident Evil 7
item.description: Microsoft has revealed the second wave of Game Pass additions for March. Disco Elysium and Resident Evil 7: Biohazard headline the 12-title batch, and several games previously exclusive to the Ultimate tier are also expanding to Premium. DreamWorks Gabby's Dollhouse: Ready to Party kicks off the wave on March 17. South of Midnight, the action-adventure from Xbox studio Compulsion Games, and The Alters both arrive on March 18 on the Premium tier after being Ultimate-only. The Alters, from Frostpunk studio 11 Bit Studios, strands you on a hostile planet where your survival plan involves creating...

item.title: Judge Deals Major Blow to RFK Jr.
item.description: U.S. District Judge Brian Murphy has temporarily barred Kennedy and HHS from tearing down the childhood vaccine schedule.

item.title: 20 fitness tracker deals to shop ahead of the Amazon Big Spring Sale
item.description: Fitness tracker deals are already starting to roll in for the Amazon Big Spring Sale. Here's the best deals on Apple, Garmin, and more.

item.title: The best early gaming deals to shop ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: Shop early Pokémon deals before Amazon's Big Spring Sale, from TCG boxes and tins to discounted Nintendo Switch games.

item.title: Meet Vurt, the mobile-first streaming platform for indie filmmakers embracing vertical video
item.description: Micro-drama apps make billions in consumer spending, so VURT launched its streaming app to allow indie filmmakers to capitalize on the vertical video trend.

item.title: Google’s Personal Intelligence feature is expanding to all US users
item.description: Personal Intelligence allows Google's AI assistant to tap into your Google ecosystem, such as Gmail and Google Photos, to provide more tailored responses.

item.title: This Wing FTP Server flaw is being actively exploited in attacks – CISA says mitigate now
item.description: CISA adds a new vulnerability to KEV, signaling abuse in the wild.

item.title: Resident Evil 7 gave us the series' best DLC, and I hope Capcom takes note for Requiem's expansion
item.description: Resident Evil 7 was Capcom at its best when it comes to DLC, and I hope Requiem takes note.

item.title: Google makes Gemini personalization available to free users
item.description: At the start of the year, Google introduced Personal Intelligence, a Gemini feature that allows the chatbot to pull information from the user's other Google apps and services to generate personalized responses. After making the feature first available to Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers, the company is expanding availability to more users in the US. Google is kicking off the expansion with AI Mode. Starting today, anyone in the US can enable Personal Intelligence inside of the company's dedicated search chatbot. To enable the feature, tap on your profile, select Search personalization, foll...

item.title: The Comeback Season 3 review: Lisa Kudrow warns us of the AI apocalypse
item.description: Lisa Kudrow's Valerie Cherish faces off with AI in "The Comeback"s spectacular final season, premiering March 22.

item.title: Paradise season 3 has been confirmed — but it could be the final chapter for the hit Hulu show
item.description: Paradise season 3 is going ahead, but it could be our final visit to the bunker and beyond.

item.title: La Google Nest Cam Outdoor 2K, boostée à l’IA avec Gemini, atteint son prix le plus bas sur Amazon
item.description: Pensée pour l'extérieur, la Google Nest Cam Outdoor filaire est une caméra de surveillance connectée qui filme en 2K et exploite Gemini pour mieux analyser les scènes qu'elle observe. Actuellement, vous la trouverez à 124,99 euros au lieu de 149,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Stryker says it’s restoring systems after pro-Iran hackers wiped thousands of employee devices
item.description: The hack, which brought ongoing widespread disruption to the company's operations, is thought to be the first major cyberattack in the United States in response to the Trump administration's war in Iran.

item.title: Intel announces Core Ultra 200HX Plus CPUs for high-end gaming laptops
item.description: Intel has a pair of new flagship CPUs coming to a variety of pricey gaming laptops: the Core Ultra 9 290 HX Plus and Core Ultra 7 270HX Plus. The Arrow Lake Refresh chips sport 24 cores / 24 threads and 20 cores / 20 threads, respectively. Like Intel's recently announced desktop CPUs, the new […]

item.title: March Madness 2026: How to watch every game of the NCAA basketball tournaments
item.description: It’s time to lock in those brackets. The 2026 NCAA basketball tournaments, affectionately known as March Madness, begin this week. In fact, some of the action on the men’s side starts tonight. Both the men’s and women’s tournaments are available to stream through various apps and services, but navigating the web of broadcasters and TV channels can be confusing. We’ve broken down when all the games are happening, where to watch and the best options for saving some cash doing so. What does March Madness start?The men’s NCAA Basketball Tournament begins on Tuesday, March 17 with two of the First ...

item.title: How to watch Sporting vs. Bodo/Glimt online for free
item.description: How to watch the Champions League for free. Watch Sporting vs. Bodo/Glimt in the Champions League for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How much are you worth?
item.description: An imperfect algorithm to estimate your employability and earning potential. Human beings are complicated creatures, but we are also relentless forecasters. We spend much of our lives trying to infer the future from the past. Investors scrutinize market data to anticipate tomorrow’s returns. Meteorologists analyze yesterday’s weather to predict next week’s storms. And most of us, at some point, wonder where our own lives are headed....

item.title: Oppo Watch X3 : 5 jours d’autonomie et écran ultra-lumineux, la rivale de l’Apple Watch Ultra arrive
item.description: À l'occasion de la présentation de son nouvel Oppo Find N6 pliant, le constructeur chinois a aussi levé le voile sur sa dernière montre connectée, l'Oppo Watch X3, qui devrait arriver prochainement en France sous Wear OS.

item.title: « Nous assistons à la transformation d’une galaxie en direct » : cette galaxie voisine cache un choc colossal
item.description: Des étoiles qui filent dans tous les sens alors que le gaz dont elles sont nées tourne sagement autour du centre de cette galaxie naine. Depuis plusieurs décennies, les astronomes espéraient comprendre ce comportement surréaliste du Petit Nuage de Magellan. Ils viennent de débusquer une piste...

item.title: OpenAI expands government footprint with AWS deal, report says
item.description: OpenAI has reportedly signed a partnership with AWS to sell its AI systems to the U.S. government for classified and unclassified work, marking an expansion beyond its Pentagon deal last month.

item.title: CERN Nails Down Elusive Heavy Proton Cousin After Detector Upgrade
item.description: The new particle, named Xi-cc-plus, carries two heavy charm quarks and is about four times heavier than an ordinary proton.

item.title: Sonos CEO says the company remains 'really excited' about headphones — but in-car audio isn't a priority
item.description: Sonos boss Tom Conrad has been speaking to Bloomberg about plans for headphones and audio for the car.

item.title: Nvidia veut faire tourner l’IA directement dans l’espace
item.description: Après avoir envahi les centres de données terrestres avec ses GPU, Nvidia veut se lancer sur un terrain de jeu bien plus vaste : l'espace ! Le géant des semi-conducteurs a présenté plusieurs nouveautés pour équiper les satellites et les futurs (?) data centers orbitaux.

item.title: Cybercriminals using AI for fraud are making far more profit, Interpol claims
item.description: Polishing phishing emails and cloning voices are just some of the ways crooks use AI to boost their campaigns.

item.title: The evolution of cyber deception: Does it deserve a place in your security strategy?
item.description: The overall objectives for cyber deception have evolved. Understanding its value starts with understanding where it fits within your security stack.

item.title: Cartes d’identité, données médicales… une nouvelle fuite massive aurait frappé la France
item.description: Une vaste base de données sensibles concernant 530 000 Français vient d'être mise en vente sur le dark web. Selon le vendeur, les données ont été volées à la Fédération française de rugby. Celle-ci reconnaît avoir été la cible d'une vaste campagne de phishing.

item.title: Two more EVs for the trash heap: Volvo EX30 and Honda Prologue
item.description: The steady stream of news about automakers cancelling or discontinuing electric vehicles continues apace. This week it's Volvo's small, quirky EX30 and Honda's solo electric offering in the US, the Prologue. Both are the latest victims of stagnating EV sales in the US thanks to the Trump administration's decision to eliminate tax incentives. First, the […]...

item.title: Several Sonos audio products got their first 2026 discounts
item.description: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale kicks off on March 25th, though some great tech sales are already available. Sonos is one of several companies that has switched on sales for its products, including some that haven’t previously been discounted this year. While the company is best known for its home theater gear, these discounts largely focus […]

item.title: Le PlayStation Portal se met à jour et améliore la qualité d’image avec un nouveau mode d’affichage
item.description: Sony n'a pas oublié son PlayStation Portal. Une mise à jour à venir propose plusieurs nouveautés, la principale étant l’apparition d'un mode d'affichage supérieur.

item.title: Artemis II : la Nasa accélère vers un lancement imminent après de multiples retards
item.description: Après des mois de tests, de reports et de réparations, la mission Artemis II semble enfin prête à décoller. La Nasa vise désormais le 1er avril pour lancer ses astronautes autour de la Lune. Espérons que ce ne soit pas une blague !

item.title: Crimson Desert's PS5 trophy list has leaked ahead of its launch, but you're unlikely to be spoiled because nobody knows what 'shadow guided into light has restored the forgotten sanctums' is supposed to mean
item.description: The PlayStation 5 trophy list for Crimson Desert has leaked ahead of the game's launch, but the achievements don't appear to give anything away.

item.title: Microsoft appoints a new Copilot boss after AI leadership shake-up
item.description: Microsoft is doing another executive shuffle today to reorganize how it engineers its Copilot assistant. Different teams have been working on the consumer and commercial sides of Copilot for years, but Microsoft is about to unify parts of them in an effort to create a more cohesive Copilot for businesses and consumers. The changes will […]

item.title: The future of code is exciting and terrifying
item.description: Suddenly it seems like everyone's a coder. Or, at the very least, like they play one in the Claude Code app. But even for the seasoned pros, the act of software development is changing fast - many people are writing less code themselves and instead spending their time managing agents and projects. So what does […]

item.title: AI’s ‘boys’ club’ could widen the wealth gap for women, says Rana el Kaliouby
item.description: AI investor Rana el Kaliouby warns that if women are shut out of AI funding and leadership, the consequences will be grim.

item.title: Amazon launches one- and three-hour delivery options in the US
item.description: Amazon just launched one-hour and three-hour delivery options in many cities and towns throughout the US. As a matter of fact, the company says three-hour delivery windows are already available in over 2,000 locations, while one-hour windows have launched in "hundreds" of cities. You can check to see if your area is covered by clicking right here. Just like same-day and next-day delivery, this doesn't cover every available item. Amazon boasts that over 90,000 products are ready for "fast, reliable delivery in just a few clicks." There has been a priority placed on the kinds of items typically ...

item.title: Shoutout to Xbox owners for beta testing Starfield ahead of its PS5 launch next month
item.description: Starfield is coming to PS5, and it's launching alongside a new DLC and free update.

item.title: Oura enters India’s smart ring market with the Ring 4
item.description: Finnish smart ring maker Oura is finally launching in India, taking on local rivals such as Ultrahuman in a relatively young smart ring market that is becoming price-sensitive thanks to an influx of low-cost options.

item.title: Quelle voiture électrique familiale choisir en 2026 ?
item.description: Le choix d'un véhicule électrique est différent selon les usages, et c'est celui des familles qui nous intéresse dans ce guide. Nous passons ici en revue l'offre actuelle des voitures électriques familiales. Voici notre sélection des meilleurs modèles.

item.title: Gamers are right to be disgusted by NVIDIA's DLSS 5
item.description: You can sum up the gamer response to NVIDIA's DLSS 5 announcement with the ever-relevant Fallout 4 meme: "Everyone disliked that." Across social media and Reddit last night, I couldn't find anyone who's genuinely positive about the potential for DLSS 5, which uses AI to add "photorealistic" lighting and materials to in-game models and environments. Instead, it's mostly complaints about the feature being another avenue for AI slop. And you know what? I agree. It's not unusual to see gamers being reflexively angry about new technology on the internet, especially when it's being pitched by NVIDIA...

item.title: Free Switch 2 Update Finally Makes OG Switch Completely Irrelevant
item.description: Now you have no excuse to play all those original Switch games you never finished.

item.title: Starfield is coming to the PS5 and getting a pair of major updates in April
item.description: After lots of rumors, it's now official: Bethesda's sci-fi epic Starfield is coming to the PS5. It'll launch on Sony's console on April 7th, and that day will also see the debut of two major updates for the game - one paid, one free - a combination that Bethesda describes as "the biggest update to […]

item.title: I thought this cheap Ikea cupboard light would help solve my storage woes — I was wrong
item.description: I had such high hopes for this motion sensor light, but when I got it home I was sorely disappointed

item.title: AI‑powered commerce is here – how ready are you for autonomous buying?
item.description: As autonomous agents take over, brands must adjust to a new reality in which machine‑led decisions increasingly shape commerce.

item.title: Tumblr updated reblogs to function more like tweets and users hate it
item.description: Tumblr has overhauled its reblogging feature to add new options for interacting with chained posts, and it hasn't gone down well with many of the platform's users. The update announced by Tumblr on Monday enables users to like, reblog, and reply to any post nestled within a reblog chain, with subsequent reblogs having their own […]
